name: Whale Tracker MCP Server
description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for tracking cryptocurrency whale transactions using the Whale Alert API

tools.name: get_recent_transactions
tools.description: Fetch recent whale transactions with optional filters for blockchain, minimum value, and limit.

tools.name: get_transaction_details
tools.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific transaction by its ID.

resources.name: whale://transactions/{blockchain}
resources.description: Expose recent transactions for a specified blockchain as contextual data.

prompts.name: query_whale_activity
prompts.description: A reusable template for analyzing whale transaction patterns, optionally filtered by blockchain.
